title: procris visciformis
intro: Procris visciformis, also known as the Dwarf Mondo Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, with its health benefits attributed to its rich content of bioactive compounds. Procris visciformis is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
intro_study: According to "Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zhongyao zazhi = China journal of Chinese materia medica", Procris visciformis benefits include anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and bacteriostatic effects.
